title: Wave-optics imprints of dark matter subhalos on strongly lensed gravitational waves. II. Saddle images and detectability
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures
summary: Wave-optics interference in strongly lensed gravitational waves is a new interferometric probe of dark matter substructure: a subhalo population threading a galaxy-scale lens imprints frequency-dependent distortions on the amplification factor of each macro image. In a companion paper (arXiv:2603.04267), we computed these imprints for the magnified minimum image. Here, we extend the calculation to the saddle-point image and we assess the detectability of the combined signal with the Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA). Evaluating the amplification factor at a saddle is numerically delicate, because the equal-arrival-time contours are open and the subhalo signal is a small difference of large terms; we present a time-domain method that resolves it. Across a Monte Carlo ensemble of cold dark matter subhalo realizations, subhalos induce percent-level amplitude and phase modulations in both image parities, while the mean (de)magnification splits by parity: the minimum is net magnified and the saddle net demagnified. Demodulating the macro-image interference recovers the per-image modulations, and a matched-filter analysis that projects out the lens parameters yields a combined detection above $5σ$ in $62\%$ of realizations for fiducial massive-black-hole-binary sources of total mass $\sim10^{6}\,M_\odot$ at redshift $1.5$, provided the source lies close to the lens caustic at small impact parameter $y_{\rm src}\lesssim0.1$. Folding these naive per-event significances through optimistic strong-lensing rate forecasts yields $10$-$20$ substructure detections over the LISA mission. Strongly lensed gravitational waves are thus a sensitive, complementary probe of substructure at $10^{4}$-$10^{7}\,M_\odot$ scales inaccessible to electromagnetic observations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强引力透镜引力波中的波光学干涉效应对暗物质次结构的探测能力，提出了一种时域方法计算鞍点像的放大因子，并评估了LISA探测器的检测能力。结果表明，在冷暗物质次结构模型下，LISA有望在任务期内探测到10-20个次结构事件，为10⁴-10⁷ M⊙尺度上的暗物质次结构提供新的探测手段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜引力波中的波动光学干涉是一种探测暗物质次结构的新型干涉测量手段：贯穿星系尺度透镜的次晕群体会在每个宏像的放大因子上留下随频率变化的畸变。在姊妹论文（arXiv:2603.04267）中，我们计算了这些印记在放大的最小像上的表现。本文将该计算推广到鞍点像，并评估了联合信号在激光干涉空间天线（LISA）上的可探测性。在鞍点处计算放大因子在数值上较为精细，因为等到达时间轮廓是开放的，且次晕信号是大项的小差值；我们提出了一种时域方法来解决这一问题。在冷暗物质次晕实现的蒙特卡洛系综中，次晕在两个像奇偶性上均引起百分量级的振幅和相位调制，而平均（去）放大率随奇偶性分裂：最小像净放大，鞍点像净去放大。解调宏像干涉可恢复每个像的调制，而通过投影出透镜参数的匹配滤波分析，在基准大质量黑洞双星源（总质量约10⁶ M⊙，红移1.5）靠近透镜尖点且小碰撞参数y_src≲0.1的条件下，62%的实现可获得高于5σ的联合探测。将这些朴素的事件显著性通过乐观的强透镜率预测进行折叠，在LISA任务期间可得到10-20次次结构探测。因此，强引力透镜引力波是探测电磁观测无法触及的10⁴-10⁷ M⊙尺度次结构的高灵敏度、互补性探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜引力波是探测10⁴-10⁷ M⊙尺度暗物质次结构的高灵敏度、互补性探针，弥补了电磁观测在这一质量尺度的空白。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Iso-arrival-time (iso-Fermat) topology for three realizations, one per row, selected to span the range of subhalo detectability: (a) weak (sub-threshold), (b) strong, and (c) extreme cases (Sec. V.5 ). These rows are illustrative examples and are not drawn at random from the ensemble. The columns are the minimum (Type I, red cross; left) and saddle (Type II, red triangle; center) local panels and the global macro panels (right). All panels use the physical lens-plane coordinate \(\xi_{x,y}\) in kpc, with the halo center at the origin. WO (GO) subhalos are shown as filled (open) circles, colored by mass. For legibility, the scatter points show only the subhalos with \(m_{sub}>10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\) , while \(F(w)\) calculations also include the more numerous lighter perturbers down to \(10^{2}\,M_{\odot}\) . The green circle in each local panel marks a single subhalo whose removal lowers that image’s detection significance by more than \(50\%\) (a leave-one-out test, Sec. V.5 ). Such a dominant perturber is present only in the strong and extreme minimum and the extreme saddle, in each case a \(\sim 10^{6}\,M_{\odot}\) perturber within \(b\lesssim 0.01\,R_{s}\) of the image.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个实现（每行一个）的等到达时间（等费马）拓扑，选取以覆盖次晕可探测性范围：(a) 弱（亚阈值），(b) 强，以及(c) 极端情况（第V.5节）。这些行是说明性示例，并非从系综中随机抽取。列是最小像（I型，红色十字；左）和鞍点像（II型，红色三角形；中）的局部面板以及全局宏面板（右）。所有面板使用物理透镜平面坐标\(\xi_{x,y}\)（单位kpc），晕中心位于原点。WO（GO）次晕以实心（空心）圆表示，按质量着色。为清晰起见，散点仅显示\(m_{sub}>10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\)的次晕，而\(F(w)\)计算还包括更丰富的较轻扰动子，低至\(10^{2}\,M_{\odot}\)。每个局部面板中的绿色圆圈标记一个次晕，其移除会使该像的探测显著性降低超过\(50\%\)（留一法检验，第V.5节）。这种主导扰动子仅出现在强和极端最小像以及极端鞍点像中，每种情况下均为位于像\(b\lesssim 0.01\,R_{s}\)内的\(\sim 10^{6}\,M_{\odot}\)扰动子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: WO signal of the minimum image versus frequency, shown for \(50\) randomly sampled realizations: the amplification factor \(|F(f)|\) (top), the relative amplitude modulation \(|F/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) (middle), and the phase modulation (bottom).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：最小像的WO信号随频率的变化，展示50个随机采样实现：放大因子\(|F(f)|\)（上），相对振幅调制\(|F/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\)（中），以及相位调制（下）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The same as Fig. 2 , but for the saddle image. The fluctuation amplitude is comparable to the minimum (parity-blind), while the mean offset differs.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但针对鞍点像。波动幅度与最小像相当（与奇偶性无关），而平均偏移不同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Distribution function of the amplitude modulation across 1000 realizations at \(f=10^{-4}\,{Hz}\) (dashed) and \(10^{-3}\,{Hz}\) (solid), for the minimum (blue) and saddle (red). The bars above the curves mark the \(68\%\) (thick) and \(95\%\) (thin) intervals, with a tick at the median. The three example realizations (a), (b), and (c) of Fig. 1 lie at the \(28\) th, \(92\) nd, and \(99.7\) th percentiles of the amplitude-modulation amplitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在\(f=10^{-4}\,{Hz}\)（虚线）和\(10^{-3}\,{Hz}\)（实线）处，1000个实现中振幅调制的分布函数，针对最小像（蓝色）和鞍点像（红色）。曲线上方的条形标记\(68\%\)（粗）和\(95\%\)（细）区间，中位数处有刻度。图1的三个示例实现(a)、(b)和(c)分别位于振幅调制幅度的第28、92和99.7百分位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The same as Fig. 4 , but for the phase modulation \(\arg(1+\eta)\) . The (a), (b), and (c) realizations of Fig. 1 lie at the \(46\) th, \(96\) th, and \(99.7\) th percentiles of the phase-modulation amplitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但针对相位调制\(\arg(1+\eta)\)。图1的实现(a)、(b)和(c)分别位于相位调制幅度的第46、96和99.7百分位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Ensemble distribution of the net (de)magnification \({dc}\) for the two parities, oppositely skewed: a magnification tail for the minimum and a demagnification tail for the saddle.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：两个奇偶性的净（去）放大率\({dc}\)的系综分布，呈相反偏斜：最小像有放大尾，鞍点像有去放大尾。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Physical origin of the parity asymmetry. (a) \({dc}\) versus the local tidal strength \(T=\sum_{i}m_{i}/b_{i}^{2}\) , correlated with opposite sign for the minimum (blue, \(+\) ) and the saddle (red, \(-\) ); the opposite-sign correlation with a physical quantity ( \(T\) ) shows the parity (de)magnification is a real effect, not a numerical artifact. (b) \({dc}\) versus the macro magnification \(\sqrt{\mu}\) . The magnitude grows toward the critical curve, i.e., with increasing magnification.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：奇偶性不对称的物理起源。(a) \({dc}\)与局部潮汐强度\(T=\sum_{i}m_{i}/b_{i}^{2}\)的关系，对最小像（蓝色，\(+\)）和鞍点像（红色，\(-\)）呈相反符号的相关性；与物理量（\(T\)）的异号相关性表明奇偶性（去）放大是真实效应，而非数值假象。(b) \({dc}\)与宏放大率\(\sqrt{\mu}\)的关系。幅度向临界曲线方向（即放大率增加时）增大。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: How a dark matter substructure imprint enters a strongly lensed MBHB signal, for a strongly imprinted realization [the extreme example (c) of Fig. 1 , at the \(99.9\) th percentile of the detection significance \(\rho_{sub}\) ]. Top: time-domain strain of the two macro images about their respective mergers. The signal-to-noise of an MBHB chirp accrues over only the last \(\sim\) hours before coalescence, far shorter than the macro time delay \(\Delta t=t_{sad}-t_{min}\) (here \(\approx 36\) days, and weeks to a year for a galaxy-scale lens). Therefore, the minimum (blue) and saddle (red) are received as two cleanly separated chirps and can be analyzed independently. Bottom: the same signal as an amplitude spectral density against the LISA sensitivity curve. The coherent two-image transfer function makes \(|F_{tot}(f)|\) sweep between \(|F_{min}|+|F_{sad}|\) and \(\big||F_{min}|-|F_{sad}|\big|\) , filling the shaded band with a macro interference fringe of spacing \(1/\Delta t\) (inset). The WO subhalo imprint is the slow, frequency-dependent modulation of the band envelope , some four orders of magnitude coarser in \(f\) than the macro fringe, such that the macro delay and the per-image subhalo signal factorize. A frequency-independent (de)magnification would merely rescale the envelope and is degenerate with the per-image amplitude; only the envelope’s frequency dependence carries the substructure signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：暗物质次结构印记如何进入强透镜MBHB信号，针对一个强印记实现[图1的极端示例(c)，位于探测显著性\(\rho_{sub}\)的第99.9百分位]。上：两个宏像在其各自并合附近的时域应变。MBHB啁啾的信噪比仅在并合前最后约数小时内累积，远短于宏时间延迟\(\Delta t=t_{sad}-t_{min}\)（此处约36天，对于星系尺度透镜为数周至一年）。因此，最小像（蓝色）和鞍点像（红色）作为两个清晰分离的啁啾被接收，可独立分析。下：同一信号作为振幅谱密度与LISA灵敏度曲线对比。相干双像传递函数使\(|F_{tot}(f)|\)在\(|F_{min}|+|F_{sad}|\)和\(\big||F_{min}|-|F_{sad}|\big|\)之间扫动，填充阴影带，形成间距为\(1/\Delta t\)的宏干涉条纹（插图）。WO次晕印记是带包络的缓慢、随频率变化的调制，在\(f\)上比宏条纹粗约四个数量级，因此宏延迟和每个像的次晕信号可分解。与频率无关的（去）放大仅会重新缩放包络，并与每个像的振幅简并；只有包络的频率依赖性携带次结构信号。

title: LEGGOS II: A Strong Lens Model and Source-Plane Projection of the Clumpy Star-Forming Galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.48
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to ApJ on May 5, currently under review
summary: Strong gravitational lensing by galaxy clusters combined with the resolution of JWST enables studies of star formation on ~10-100 pc scales in galaxies at z~2-4. As part of the LEnsing and Galaxy Growth: Observing Substructures survey (LEGGOS), we present an updated strong lensing model of the galaxy cluster SDSSJ1110+6459 (z=0.659), which lenses the clumpy star-forming galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.481 into a highly magnified giant arc. Using JWST NIRCam imaging, NIRSpec spectroscopy, and archival HST data, we confirm and refine the identification of four multiply imaged background sources, including one newly identified system, and map over 20 luminous regions between each image of the primary arc. Spectroscopy confirms that several previously ambiguous edge "clumps" belong to the main arc at z=2.481. Despite the limited number of strongly lensed sources in the field, the resulting lens model has high precision, owing to the high density of JWST-resolved clump constraints that tightly probe the lensing potential near the giant arc. The model yields a projected lens mass of $M(<250~\mathrm{kpc}) = 1.21^{+0.09}_{-0.04} \times 10^{14}~M_\odot$, an Einstein radius of $θ_\mathrm{E} = 10.8^{+0.3}_{-0.4}~\mathrm{arcsec}$, and a total effective magnification of $μ_\mathrm{tot}=24.2^{+3.4}_{-1.2}$ for the giant arc. Across the arc, individual clump magnifications span $μ_\mathrm{clump}\sim4-19$, with fractional magnification uncertainties of $σ_μ/|μ_{\rm best}|\sim0.03-0.09$. We report a $\sim2-8\times$ improvement in magnification precision over previous models. Ongoing and future analyses of this arc will enable robust measurements of star-forming structure, building on the lensing foundation established here for LEGGOS studies of galaxy growth and feedback during cosmic noon.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST和HST数据更新了星系团SDSSJ1110+6459的强引力透镜模型，精确测量了z=2.481处星暴星系中20多个发光团块的放大率，模型精度相比此前提升约2-8倍，为研究宇宙正午时期星系形成与反馈提供了高精度基础。

AI.method: 基于JWST NIRCam成像、NIRSpec光谱及HST存档数据，更新SDSSJ1110+6459星系团透镜模型；确认4个多像背景源（含1个新系统），映射主弧20余个发光团块；利用高密度团块约束优化透镜势。
AI.result: 投影透镜质量M(<250 kpc)=1.21×10¹⁴ M☉，爱因斯坦半径θ_E=10.8角秒，总放大率μ_tot=24.2；单个团块放大率μ_clump~4-19，放大率分数不确定度σ_μ/|μ_best|~0.03-0.09，精度较此前模型提升约2-8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该高精度透镜模型为后续LEGGOS研究提供了坚实基础，将支持对星暴星系中星形成结构、星系增长与反馈过程进行可靠的测量与分析。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团产生的强引力透镜效应结合JWST的分辨率，使得在红移z~2-4的星系中研究约10-100 pc尺度上的恒星形成成为可能。作为透镜与星系增长：观测子结构巡天（LEGGOS）的一部分，我们提出了星系团SDSSJ1110+6459（z=0.659）的更新强透镜模型，该星系团将红移z=2.481处的团块状恒星形成星系SGASJ111020.0+645950.8透镜成高度放大的巨弧。利用JWST NIRCam成像、NIRSpec光谱以及存档的HST数据，我们确认并改进了四个多重成像背景源的识别（包括一个新识别的系统），并在主弧的每个像中绘制了超过20个明亮区域。光谱证实，先前几个模糊的边缘“团块”属于红移z=2.481的主弧。尽管该场中强透镜源数量有限，但所得透镜模型具有高精度，这得益于JWST分辨出的团块约束的高密度，这些约束紧密探测了巨弧附近的透镜势。该模型给出的投影透镜质量为$M(<250~\mathrm{kpc}) = 1.21^{+0.09}_{-0.04} \times 10^{14}~M_\odot$，爱因斯坦半径为$θ_\mathrm{E} = 10.8^{+0.3}_{-0.4}~\mathrm{arcsec}$，巨弧的总有效放大率为$μ_\mathrm{tot}=24.2^{+3.4}_{-1.2}$。在弧上，单个团块的放大率范围为$μ_\mathrm{clump}\sim4-19$，放大率分数不确定度为$σ_μ/|μ_{\rm best}|\sim0.03-0.09$。我们报告了相比先前模型约2-8倍的放大率精度提升。对该弧的持续和未来分析将能够对恒星形成结构进行稳健测量，这建立在本文为LEGGOS研究宇宙正午期间的星系增长与反馈所建立的透镜基础之上。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该高精度透镜模型为后续LEGGOS研究提供了坚实基础，将支持对星暴星系中星形成结构、星系增长与反馈过程进行可靠的测量与分析。

title: Cooling, conduction, compact objects: Gravothermal evolution of dissipative self-interacting dark matter halos
comment: 19 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables; to be submitted to A&A
summary: Many proposed self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) models give rise to radiative processes that can dissipate energy. Understanding their impact on astrophysical objects through simulations and comparing the results with observations may thus constrain SIDM models. In this work, we systematically investigate how dissipation alters the gravothermal evolution of isolated SIDM halos by independently varying dissipation and heat conduction and identify potential observational signatures. To this end, we present the first extension of the $N$-body formalism for frequent small-angle self-interactions (fSIDM) to include effective dissipation. We compare all results for isolated halos with a dissipative gravothermal fluid model to assess its validity and limitations. We find that dissipation qualitatively changes the gravothermal evolution of SIDM halos beyond simply accelerating collapse. Sufficiently strong central cooling can invert the usual role of heat conduction: the formation of an isothermal core is suppressed such that conduction remains directed inward throughout the evolution. Outer halo regions beyond the scale radius can cool efficiently rather than being heated by conduction, resulting in a larger region of mass infall and a less pronounced indentation between the core and the outer halo in the final density profile. These effects depend strongly on the cooling rate but are comparatively insensitive to the angular dependence of the self-interaction cross section. We further show that weakly dissipative self-interactions can explain the properties of the recently observed strong lens perturber in JVAS~B1938+666 with significantly shorter evolution times or, equivalently, smaller cross sections compared to the elastic case. Our results open a new route to connecting halo structure and recently reported compact objects to dark-sector microphysics.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 许多提出的自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型会产生能够耗散能量的辐射过程。通过模拟理解它们对天体物理物体的影响，并将结果与观测进行比较，可以约束SIDM模型。在这项工作中，我们通过独立改变耗散和热传导，系统地研究了耗散如何改变孤立SIDM晕的引力热演化，并识别潜在的观测特征。为此，我们首次将用于频繁小角度自相互作用的N体形式扩展到包含有效耗散。我们将孤立晕的所有结果与耗散引力热流体模型进行比较，以评估其有效性和局限性。我们发现，耗散在定性上改变了SIDM晕的引力热演化，而不仅仅是加速坍缩。足够强的中心冷却可以逆转热传导的通常作用：等温核的形成被抑制，使得传导在整个演化过程中保持向内方向。尺度半径外的外部晕区可以有效地冷却，而不是被传导加热，导致更大的物质内落区域，并在最终密度剖面中核心与外部晕之间的凹陷不那么明显。这些效应强烈依赖于冷却速率，但对自相互作用截面的角度依赖性相对不敏感。我们进一步表明，弱耗散自相互作用可以解释最近在JVAS B1938+666中观测到的强透镜扰动体的性质，且与弹性情况相比，所需的演化时间或截面显著更短。我们的结果为连接晕结构和最近报道的致密天体与暗物质微观物理开辟了一条新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，弱耗散自相互作用可以解释强透镜扰动体观测，且所需演化时间或截面更小，为连接晕结构和致密天体与暗物质微观物理提供了新途径。

Both decelerate by \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{drag}}\) and experience opposite \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{rand}}\) in a random direction perpendicular to the relative velocity \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{ij}\) . Right: Zoom-in to the level of physical particles for a dissipative process like Eq. 6 . The physical particles undergo many such scatterings in a single numerical interaction. Therefore, the radiated momenta \(\boldsymbol{k}\) average out and the transverse momenta of the outgoing DM particles give rise to diffusion with vanishing drift in the CMS frame modeled by \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{rand}}\) . The radiated energy \(k^{0}\) accumulates and leads to an increased drag. For readability, the scattering angle and the magnitude of the radiated momentum \(\boldsymbol{k}\) are highly exaggerated.

title: Extended [CII] gas emission in and around a massive quiescent galaxy at z=7.3
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We report the discovery of [CII] 158 micron emission in and around the most distant known massive quiescent galaxy RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 at z = 7.27. Observed with ALMA in band 6, the [CII] line independently confirms the spectroscopic redshift from JWST/NIRSpec spectra at low and medium resolution. The emission extends over an effective radius R_eff,[CII] = 8 +/- 3 kpc, well beyond the compact stellar body traced by JWST/NIRCam (R_eff = 209 (+33/-24) pc), with a significant fraction of approximately 70% of the flux arising from a circumgalactic halo. No dust continuum is detected at rest-frame ~160 micron, setting an upper limit on the infrared luminosity of L_IR < 1.4 x 10^11 Lsun, overall consistent with expectations from rest-frame UV to near-infrared SED modeling under energy balance. Converting the galaxy-scale [CII] emission into cold gas mass, we find log(M_mol/Msun) = 9.53 (+0.32/-0.31) and log(M_HI/Msun) = 9.46-10.34, depending on the assumed calibration and metallicity. Despite being approximately 10x more gas-poor than typical star-forming galaxies at fixed redshift, stellar mass, and [CII] to gas mass conversion, RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 retains a substantial cold gas reservoir with fractions f_gas >~ 20% and long depletion timescales across most assumptions. The extended [CII] halo carries approximately twice as much gas as the galaxy alone and shows a blueshifted velocity offset consistent with the tentative gas outflow detected in MgII absorption in previous work, suggesting a past episode of AGN-driven gas expulsion possibly linked to the suppression of star formation. The presence of a large gas reservoir in and around a massive quiescent galaxy just 700 Myr after the Big Bang implies that whatever mechanism is suppressing star formation must be remarkably effective at maintaining a low star formation efficiency on ~100 Myr timescales, even in the presence of abundant fuel.

AI.tldr: 在红移z=7.27的遥远静止星系RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7中发现[CII] 158微米发射线，其延伸至8千秒差距的晕状结构，远超致密的恒星主体（209秒差距）。该星系虽保有大量冷气体（气体分数>20%），但恒星形成效率极低，暗示存在高效的恒星形成抑制机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在已知最遥远的大质量静止星系RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7（红移z=7.27）内部及其周围发现[CII] 158微米发射。使用ALMA波段6观测，[CII]谱线独立确认了来自JWST/NIRSpec低中分辨率光谱的光谱红移。该发射延伸至有效半径R_eff,[CII] = 8 ± 3 kpc，远超JWST/NIRCam追踪的致密恒星主体（R_eff = 209 (+33/-24) pc），其中约70%的通量来自环星系晕。在静止框架约160微米处未探测到尘埃连续谱，为红外光度设定了上限L_IR < 1.4 × 10^11 Lsun，总体上与能量平衡下静止框架紫外到近红外SED建模的预期一致。将星系尺度的[CII]发射转化为冷气体质量，我们得到log(M_mol/Msun) = 9.53 (+0.32/-0.31) 和 log(M_HI/Msun) = 9.46-10.34，具体取决于假定的校准和金属丰度。尽管在固定红移、恒星质量和[CII]到气体质量转换下，其气体贫乏程度约为典型恒星形成星系的10倍，但RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7仍保留了大量的冷气体储库，气体分数f_gas >~ 20%，且在大多数假设下耗散时标较长。延伸的[CII]晕携带的气体量约为星系本身的两倍，并显示出蓝移速度偏移，与先前工作中MgII吸收探测到的疑似气体外流一致，暗示过去可能发生过AGN驱动的气体喷发事件，与恒星形成的抑制有关。在大爆炸后仅7亿年，一个巨大静止星系内部及周围存在大量气体储库，这意味着无论何种机制抑制恒星形成，都必须在约1亿年时标内极其有效地维持低恒星形成效率，即使存在充足的燃料。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该静止星系存在大量冷气体但恒星形成效率极低，表明维持静止状态的机制（可能为AGN驱动的气体外流）能在约1亿年时标内有效抑制恒星形成，即使存在充足的燃料供应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ALMA band 6 spectrum of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7. The yellow and red colors show the total emission, including the spatially extended component, and the central beam extraction that we associate with the galaxy, respectively. The black line and gray shaded area indicate the best-fit Gaussian model to the total emission and its uncertainties. The residuals are shown in the bottom inset, with the gray shaded area indicating the noise RMS. The velocity axis refers to the [C II ] line centroid of the total emission. title: Baryonic mass budgets in the central regions of the Bullet Cluster and their consistency with strong lensing in MOND
comment: 23 pages, 10 figures. Accepted by PRD
summary: Strong lensing observations of the Bullet Cluster have traditionally been regarded as strong evidence for dark matter and a major challenge to Milgromian dynamics (MOND). The offset between the lensing mass and the X-ray gas centroids implies a substantial amount of unseen mass near the brightest cluster galaxies (BCGs). However, the high metallicities observed in both the intracluster gas and the massive early-type member galaxies suggest a past stellar population dominated by massive stars, whose evolved remnants contribute additional baryonic mass. This effect is naturally incorporated in the integrated galaxy-wide initial mass function (IGIMF) theory, which predicts substantially larger baryonic masses than a canonical IMF. In this work, we re-estimate the baryonic masses of the three BCG-centred core regions of the Bullet Cluster and compare them with MOND strong-lensing masses. We derive IGIMF masses using stellar population synthesis models with constant and (self-) enriched metallicities, representing lower and upper mass limits, respectively. We find that the MOND strong-lensing masses of all three cores lie within the range predicted by the IGIMF models. These results suggest that the baryonic mass budget inferred under the IGIMF framework is consistent with MOND requirements in the core regions of the Bullet Cluster. However, the physical viability of this scenario also depends on the spatial distribution and dynamical behavior of the remnant population, which remain to be established. More generally, regardless of the validity of MOND, the results imply that less dark matter may be required than previously inferred.

AI.tldr: 子弹头星团的强引力透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质的强证据和对MOND理论的挑战。本文利用IGIMF理论重新估计了星团核心区的重子质量，发现MOND强透镜质量落在IGIMF模型预测范围内，表明在IGIMF框架下重子质量预算与MOND要求一致，但剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为仍需验证。
AI.motivation: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测一直被视为暗物质存在的关键证据，同时对MOND理论构成重大挑战。作者希望检验MOND是否能在修正的重子质量估计下解释观测结果。
AI.method: 利用IGIMF理论，通过恒星族合成模型分别采用恒定金属丰度和自增丰金属丰度，对子弹头星团三个最亮星系团星系（BCG）核心区域的重子质量进行重新估计，并与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。
AI.result: 三个核心区域的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的质量范围内，表明IGIMF框架下的重子质量预算与MOND要求一致。
AI.conclusion: IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质存在的有力证据，也是对米尔格罗姆动力学（MOND）的重大挑战。透镜质量与X射线气体质心之间的偏移表明，在 brightest 星团星系（BCGs）附近存在大量不可见质量。然而，在星团内气体和大型早型成员星系中观测到的高金属丰度表明，过去恒星群体以大质量恒星为主，其演化后的残骸贡献了额外的重子质量。这一效应自然地包含在集成星系初始质量函数（IGIMF）理论中，该理论预测的重子质量比标准IMF显著更大。在本工作中，我们重新估计了子弹头星团三个以BCG为中心的核心区域的重子质量，并将其与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。我们使用恒星种群合成模型推导IGIMF质量，分别采用恒定金属丰度和（自）富集金属丰度，代表质量下限和上限。我们发现，所有三个核心的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的范围内。这些结果表明，在IGIMF框架下推断的重子质量预算与子弹头星团核心区域的MOND要求一致。然而，这一情景的物理可行性还取决于残骸种群的空间分布和动力学行为，这仍有待确定。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，这些结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

title: Little Red Dots on FIRE: Exploring the formation and observational signatures of ultra-compact early galaxies
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures. Comments most welcome
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are compact sources with broad Balmer lines, Balmer breaks, anomalous UV emission, rising red continuum, and uncertain origin. We use FIRE cosmological simulations, 3D dust radiative transfer, and synthetic emission-line data cubes to test whether ultra-compact early galaxies can reproduce LRD-like observables without invoking AGN. In progenitors of present-day group halos ($M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$), we identify transient phases at $z \approx 4-8$ lasting $\sim 150-400$ Myr in which strong dissipative inflows build massive ($M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$), UV-bright ($-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$), ultra-compact ($R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc) stellar cores with extreme circular velocity ($V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$) and consistent with several LRD properties: strong Balmer breaks ($F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$); blue UV beta slopes ($β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$); dust masses; ALMA non-detections; and Balmer-line widths up to $\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$ broadened by galaxy-scale dynamics. However, stellar emission and host-galaxy kinematics alone do not reproduce the red rest-optical continuum, more extreme Balmer breaks ($\gtrsim 2.5$) and line widths ($\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$), or the broad-Balmer/narrow-forbidden-line signature of broad-line AGN. The same ultra-compact conditions efficiently fuel central BHs, suggesting a hybrid stellar+AGN scenario in which compact stars explain the UV continuum, Balmer break, and intermediate line widths while AGN supply the red optical continuum and more extreme line properties. With halo masses $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$ and comoving abundance $\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$ (for $\sim 20\%$ duty-cycle at $z \approx 4-8$), ultra-compact galaxies can contribute to the massive, bright LRD population.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FIRE宇宙学模拟和3D尘埃辐射传输，研究了“小红点”（LRDs）的起源。发现早期宇宙中极端致密的恒星核（半径<300 pc）可以在不依赖活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现部分LRD观测特征（如巴尔默跳变、UV光谱斜率等），但无法解释红色光学连续谱和更极端的谱线宽度，因此提出恒星+AGN混合模型：致密恒星核负责UV和中等宽度谱线，AGN贡献红色连续谱和极端谱线。
AI.motivation: 小红点（LRDs）是JWST发现的一类致密高红移源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跳变、异常UV发射和上升的红色连续谱，但其物理起源（恒星主导还是AGN主导）尚不明确。
AI.method: 使用FIRE宇宙学模拟、3D尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，模拟极早期致密星系在z≈4-8的演化，并与LRD观测特征进行对比。
AI.result: 在z≈4-8、持续约150-400 Myr的暂态阶段，形成了质量10^8.5-10^10.5 M⊙、UV亮度-23到-20 mag、有效半径<300 pc的致密恒星核，圆速度>500 km/s。这些结构可以解释巴尔默跳变（~2）、UVβ斜率（~-1.25）、尘埃质量、ALMA非探测和~1500 km/s的巴尔默线宽，但无法解释更极端的巴尔默跳变（>2.5）、线宽（>2000 km/s）和红色光学连续谱。
AI.conclusion: 致密早期星系可以贡献部分LRD种群，但完全解释LRD需要恒星+AGN混合模型：致密恒星核解释UV、巴尔默跳变和中等线宽，AGN提供红色连续谱和极端谱线特性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是紧凑的源，具有宽的巴尔默线、巴尔默跳变、异常的紫外发射、上升的红色连续谱以及不确定的起源。我们利用FIRE宇宙学模拟、三维尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，测试超紧凑早期星系是否能在不涉及活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现类似LRD的可观测特征。在现今群级暗晕（$M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$）的前身中，我们识别出在$z \approx 4-8$处持续约$\sim 150-400$ Myr的瞬态阶段，其中强烈的耗散内流构建了质量巨大（$M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$）、紫外明亮（$-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$）、超紧凑（$R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc）的恒星核，具有极端环向速度（$V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$），并与若干LRD性质一致：强巴尔默跳变（$F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$）；蓝色紫外β斜率（$β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$）；尘埃质量；ALMA未探测；以及由星系尺度动力学展宽的巴尔默线宽度高达$\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$。然而，仅凭恒星发射和宿主星系运动学无法再现红色静止光学连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跳变（$\gtrsim 2.5$）和线宽（$\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$），或宽巴尔默/窄禁线标志的宽线AGN特征。相同的超紧凑条件有效地为中央黑洞提供燃料，暗示一种恒星+AGN混合情景，其中致密恒星解释了紫外连续谱、巴尔默跳变和中等线宽，而AGN提供了红色光学连续谱和更极端的谱线特性。暗晕质量$M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$且共动丰度$\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$（在$z \approx 4-8$处占空比约$\sim 20\%$）的超紧凑星系可以贡献于质量巨大、明亮的LRD种群。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：致密早期星系可以贡献部分LRD种群，但完全解释LRD需要恒星+AGN混合模型：致密恒星核解释UV、巴尔默跳变和中等线宽，AGN提供红色连续谱和极端谱线特性。

title: Direct detection of cool molecular gas in a star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS. Main text: 17 pages, 6 figures
summary: We investigate the molecular gas content and interstellar medium (ISM) conditions of REBELS-25, a massive, star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$. Deep VLA Q-band and ALMA Band 3 observations reveal CO(3-2) and CO(7-6) emission (both at $\sim3.5σ$), and provide an upper limit on [C I](2-1). From the CMB-corrected CO(3-2) flux-representing the highest-redshift detection of a low-$J$ CO transition to date-we derive a molecular gas mass of $M_{\rm mol}=(1.0\pm0.4)\times10^{11}\,(α_{\rm CO}/(3\,$M$_{\odot}$(K$\,$\kms$\,$pc$^2)^{-1}))\,$M$_{\odot}$, directly confirming the presence of a very massive gas reservoir only $\simeq700\,$Myr after the Big Bang. This implies an extreme gas fraction of $f_{\rm gas}\simeq0.95$, a gas-to-dust ratio of $δ_{\rm GDR}\simeq6\times10^2$, and a depletion timescale of $τ_{\rm dep}\simeq1.2\,$Gyr, broadly consistent with extrapolated scaling relations for main-sequence galaxies at lower redshift. Using the radiative transfer code TUNER, we self-consistently model CO and dust continuum emission in the context of the significant CMB background, constraining ISM properties and recovering $M_{\rm mol}= (1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})\times10^{11}\,$M$_{\odot}$, independent of assumptions about $r_{31}$ and $α_{\rm CO}$. We further discuss the use of alternative molecular gas tracers at early epochs. Combining CO and [C II] measurements, we infer an empirical [C II]-to-H$_2$ conversion factor of $α_{\rm [C II]}=(60\pm25)\,$M$_{\odot}$/L$_{\odot}$, suggesting [C II] remains a viable molecular gas tracer in the Epoch of Reionization. These results demonstrate the detectability of low-$J$ CO emission even at $z>7$, paving the way for next-generation facilities, and provide critical insights into the rapid mass assembly of galaxies during the first billion years of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过探测z=7.31星系REBELS-25的CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，确认了宇宙大爆炸后仅7亿年就存在一个极端巨大的分子气体库（约10¹¹ M☉），气体分数高达95%，并验证了[C II]作为早期宇宙分子气体示踪剂的可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索早期宇宙（再电离时代）星系的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，以理解星系在宇宙最初十亿年内的快速质量积累过程。
AI.method: 利用VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，结合辐射传输代码TUNER自洽建模CO和尘埃连续谱发射，并考虑宇宙微波背景（CMB）的影响。
AI.result: 探测到CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（均约3.5σ），获得分子气体质量约1.0×10¹¹ M☉（依赖α_CO假设）或1.8×10¹¹ M☉（通过TUNER建模），气体分数约0.95，气体尘埃比约600，消耗时标约1.2 Gyr，并推导出[C II]-H₂转换因子为60±25 M☉/L☉。
AI.conclusion: 该工作直接证实了z>7星系中低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代观测设施铺平道路，并表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂，揭示了早期星系快速质量积累的关键信息。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了REBELS-25的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，这是一个红移z=7.31的大质量恒星形成星系。深度VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测揭示了CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（两者均为~3.5σ），并提供了[C I](2-1)的上限。根据经过宇宙微波背景修正的CO(3-2)通量——这是迄今为止对低J CO跃迁的最高红移探测——我们推导出分子气体质量为M_mol=(1.0±0.4)×10^11 (α_CO/(3 M_⊙ (K km s pc^2)^{-1})) M_⊙，直接证实了大爆炸后仅约700 Myr存在一个巨大的气体储库。这意味着极端的气体分数f_gas≈0.95、气尘比δ_GDR≈6×10^2以及消耗时标τ_dep≈1.2 Gyr，与较低红移主序星系的推断标度关系大致一致。利用辐射传输代码TUNER，我们在显著宇宙微波背景的背景下自洽地模拟了CO和尘埃连续谱发射，约束了星际介质性质，并恢复了M_mol=(1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})×10^11 M_⊙，独立于关于r_31和α_CO的假设。我们进一步讨论了早期宇宙中替代分子气体示踪剂的使用。结合CO和[C II]测量，我们推断出经验性的[C II]-H_2转换因子α_[C II]=(60±25) M_⊙/L_⊙，表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂。这些结果证明了即使在z>7时低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代设施铺平了道路，并提供了对宇宙历史最初十亿年内星系快速质量积累的关键见解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectra of REBELS-25 showing the detected line emission of CO(3–2) ( top panel ) and CO(7–6) together with the undetected [C i ](2–1) emission ( bottom panel ). In each panel, we show the data presented in this paper as an aqua histogram and the respective ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma as a grey shaded area. We also display a comparison with the [C ii ] spectrum which is detected at high S/N in this source (yellow hatched histogram), rescaled to match the amplitude of the CO emission. Vertical dash-dotted lines and shaded areas show the expected frequency and ± 1 × \pm 1\times FWHM [ C ​ ii ] {}_{\rm{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}} region of each line based on the [C ii ]-based redshift of the source. Red lines show the best-fit Gaussian to the CO line when leaving all parameters free, while orange lines show the best-fit to the [C ii ] data rescaled to the amplitude of the CO emission. In the top panel, there are some gaps in the CO(3–2) data due to fully flagged channels at the edge of spectral windows.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Molecular gas depletion timescale as a function of redshift for galaxies across cosmic time (adapted from Zavala et al. , 2022 ) . The large symbols mark the values derived for REBELS-25, assuming the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 and 1 (magenta and aqua star, respectively); for clarity, the aqua star has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. Both values are broadly consistent with the extrapolation to z ∼ 7 z\sim 7 of the best-fit relation for main-sequence (MS) galaxies from Tacconi et al. ( 2020 ) (solid purple line). The dashed maroon line represents the corresponding fit from the same study for starburst (SB) galaxies. Blue and red circles indicate the individual sources in their respective MS and SB samples. The dash-dotted line shows the relation from Sommovigo et al. ( 2022b , a ) based on the evolution of mean baryonic accretion rates onto dark matter halos in dark-matter–only simulations. The hatched gray boxes mark the typical range of values derived for MS galaxies at z ∼ 4 − 6 z\sim 4-6 from [C ii ]-based gas masses in the ALPINE survey (Dessauges-Zavadsky et al. , 2020 ) , while the black ones mark the range of values derived from [C ii ]-based gas masses for the REBELS sample (Aravena et al. , 2024 ) . Additional high-redshift measurements from the literature are shown for comparison: the orange circle represents the lensed MS galaxy studied in Zavala et al. ( 2022 ) , the yellow hexagon represents HZ10 from Pavesi et al. ( 2019 ) , and green open triangles indicate SPT-selected DSFGs from Aravena et al. ( 2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：宇宙时间中星系分子气体消耗时标随红移的变化（改编自Zavala等人，2022）。大符号标记了REBELS-25推导的值，假设经过CMB修正的CO光度和α_CO=3（洋红色星）和1（浅蓝色星）；为清晰起见，浅蓝色星在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。两个值与Tacconi等人（2020）对主序星系最佳拟合关系外推到z~7（实紫线）大致一致。虚线栗色线表示同一研究对星暴星系的相应拟合。蓝色和红色圆圈分别表示其主序和星暴样本中的个别源。点划线表示Sommovigo等人（2022b, a）基于暗物质仅模拟中暗物质晕平均重子吸积率演化的关系。阴影灰色框标记了ALPINE巡测中基于[C ii]气体质量在z~4-6主序星系的典型值范围（Dessauges-Zavadsky等人，2020），而黑色框标记了REBELS样本中基于[C ii]气体质量的值范围（Aravena等人，2024）。文献中的其他高红移测量值也显示用于比较：橙色圆圈代表Zavala等人（2022）研究的透镜主序星系，黄色六边形代表Pavesi等人（2019）的HZ10，绿色空心三角形代表Aravena等人（2016）的SPT选择DSFG。

We include measurements drawn from the literature for main-sequence galaxies (MS), starburst galaxies (SB) and Lymann break analogues (LBA) (Stacey et al. , 1991 ; Ferkinhoff et al. , 2014 ; Huynh et al. , 2014 ; Magdis et al. , 2014 ; Capak et al. , 2015 ; Cormier et al. , 2015 ; Gullberg et al. , 2015 ; Schaerer et al. , 2015 ; Madden et al. , 2016 ; Accurso et al. , 2017 ; Contursi et al. , 2017 ; Hughes et al. , 2017 ; Zanella et al. , 2018 ; Rizzo et al. , 2020 , 2021 ) . The horizontal lines and shaded regions represent the mean and 1 σ \sigma scatter of the empirical α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} calibrations from Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) (pink, solid line) and Zhao et al. ( 2024 ) (cyan, dashed line), and the median of the sample studied in Rizzo et al. ( 2021 ) (cornflower blue, dash-dotted line). The large star symbols indicate the α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} values we derive for REBELS-25 using the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and assuming either α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 (magenta) or α CO = 1 \alpha_{\rm CO}=1 (aqua). The yellow and orange hexagons both refer to HZ10 (see text; Pavesi et al. , 2019 ; Algera et al. , 2025a ) , the latter has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. The values derived for REBELS-25 are broadly consistent with most low- and intermediate-redshift studies, suggesting that the [C ii ] line remains an effective, though scattered, tracer of the molecular gas reservoir even at z > 7 z>7 .

title: Little Red and Blue Dots: AGN-excited narrow lines, Lyman-$α$ emission, and resemblance to standard quasars
comment: Submitted. 33 pages, 23 figures, 3 tables
summary: We present an analysis of a sample of 36 Little Red and Blue Dots (LRDs and LBDs) at $2.26<z<7.89$, identified by JWST in the GOODS fields. While both categories are selected to have broad Balmer lines, both of them are extremely X-ray weak. Both classes share the same location on various diagnostic diagrams, consistent with AGN excitation (with some deviations which can be ascribed to low metallicity), although their weak HeII emission suggests a generally softer ionizing spectrum than ordinary AGN. LRDs display Ly$α$ emission stronger than normal star-forming galaxies, and with a broad component consistent with the broad component of H$α$. Overall, these findings indicate that LRDs and LBDs are both powered by growing black holes and their ionizing radiation escapes to ionize the surrounding interstellar medium (ISM). The broad Balmer lines ($Hα_b$ and $Hβ_b$) have different apparent properties: LBDs have EW(H$α_b$) and $Hα_b/Hβ_b$ broadly consistent with normal AGN, while LRDs have higher values of both quantities, although still in the tail of the quasars distribution. LRD models in which a gas envelope completely encases the black hole, are inconsistent with these results -- these scenarios need modification to include clumpiness, or a (classical) equatorial geometry, letting ionizing photons reach the ISM. The different broad Balmer properties imply that LBDs cannot simply be LRDs with more galaxy contribution. Scenarios in which LRDs are simply dust-obscured LBDs seem broadly consistent with the observations. Finally, these results indicate that LRDs' bolometric luminosities estimated assuming isotropic emission and complete covering by the absorber are inadequate. The few X-ray-detected LRDs suggest no deviation from the standard AGN bolometric corrections, once absorption is accounted for.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了36个小红点和蓝点（LRDs和LBDs）的JWST样本，发现它们都由黑洞驱动，具有宽巴尔默线但极弱的X射线辐射。研究指出LRD的完全包裹黑洞的气体包层模型与观测不符，需引入团块性或赤道几何结构。LRD可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD，且其各向同性辐射假设下的光度估计不准确。
AI.motivation: JWST在GOODS天区发现了大量高红移的小红点和蓝点，其本质（是活动星系核还是恒星形成星系）尚不清楚。本文旨在通过分析它们的宽线、X射线、电离线等特征，厘清这两类天体的物理本质和相互关系。
AI.method: 选取36个红移2.26<z<7.89的LRD和LBD样本，分析其宽巴尔默线（Hα_b和Hβ_b）、X射线辐射、Lyα发射线、HeII发射线等观测特征，并在多种诊断图上比较它们与正常AGN和恒星形成星系的位置。
AI.result: 两类天体都极弱X射线，在诊断图上位于AGN激发区；LRD的Lyα发射强于恒星形成星系，且有与Hα宽成分一致的宽成分；LBD的宽线性质接近正常AGN，而LRD的EW(Hα_b)和Hα_b/Hβ_b更高。完全包裹黑洞的模型与观测矛盾。
AI.conclusion: LRD和LBD都由增长中的黑洞驱动，电离辐射能逃逸到周围星际介质；LRD不可能是被更多星系成分污染的LBD，但可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD；LRD的各向同性光度估计需要修正。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了由JWST在GOODS天区识别出的36个小红点和蓝点（LRDs和LBDs）样本，其红移范围为$2.26<z<7.89$。虽然这两类天体均被选为具有宽巴尔默线，但它们都极其缺乏X射线辐射。两者在各种诊断图上占据相同位置，与活动星系核（AGN）激发一致（部分偏差可归因于低金属丰度），但其较弱的HeII发射表明其电离光谱通常比普通AGN更软。LRDs显示出比正常恒星形成星系更强的Ly$α$发射，并且其宽成分与H$α$的宽成分一致。总体而言，这些发现表明LRDs和LBDs均由增长中的黑洞驱动，其电离辐射能够逃逸并电离周围的星际介质（ISM）。宽巴尔默线（$Hα_b$和$Hβ_b$）具有不同的表观特性：LBDs的EW(H$α_b$)和$Hα_b/Hβ_b$与正常AGN大致一致，而LRDs的这两个量值均更高，尽管仍处于类星体分布的尾部。气体包层完全包裹黑洞的LRD模型与这些结果不一致——这些情景需要修改以包含团块结构或（经典）赤道几何结构，使电离光子能够到达ISM。不同的宽巴尔默线特性意味着LBDs不能简单地被视为具有更多星系成分贡献的LRDs。LRDs仅仅是尘埃遮蔽的LBDs这一情景与观测大致相符。最后，这些结果表明，基于各向同性发射和吸收体完全覆盖假设的LRD热光度估计是不充分的。少数X射线探测到的LRDs表明，在考虑吸收后，其与标准AGN热光度的修正并无偏差。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：LRD和LBD都由增长中的黑洞驱动，电离辐射能逃逸到周围星际介质；LRD不可能是被更多星系成分污染的LBD，但可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD；LRD的各向同性光度估计需要修正。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Rest-frame optical versus UV slope diagram used to select the LRDs and LBDs in our sample. This is based on the diagram presented in Hainline et al. ( 2025 ) and Kocevski et al. ( 2025a ) , and contains only the sources in our sample for which \(|\beta_{opt}|>0\) at \(>2\sigma\) . The red shaded area shows the selection criteria defined in Kocevski et al. ( 2025a ) to select LRDs. The blue shaded region shows the selection criteria for LBDs. The grey symbols are likely classical reddened AGN. The blue circles represent individual LBDs and the red squares individual X-ray undetected LRDs, while the crosses represent X-ray detected sources. The sources that fail the compactness criteria (defined in Section 2 ) are highlighted with a black circle, and the white symbols are tentative broad line AGN (as explained at the end of Section 4.1). The red star shows the slopes measured from the mean prism stack of LRDs and the blue diamond shows the stack of LBDs (Fig. 2 ). The two large symbols marked with an ‘R’ indicate the location of the blue and red Rosetta Stones (Juodžbalis et al. , 2024a ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ) . The grey contours represent non-AGN galaxies from JADES, at \(z>2\) (Hainline et al. , 2025 ) . The orange pentagon represents the composite spectrum of SDSS quasars from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) with the NIR extension from Glikman et al. ( 2006 ) . There is a third ‘reddened AGN’ (or AGN in a quiescent galaxy) which lies at \(\beta_{UV}=6\) so does not appear on this figure.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：用于选择我们样本中LRD和LBD的静止系光学与紫外斜率图。此图基于Hainline等人（2025）和Kocevski等人（2025a）提出的图，仅包含我们样本中在\(>2\sigma\)水平上满足\(|\beta_{opt}|>0\)的源。红色阴影区域显示Kocevski等人（2025a）定义的用于选择LRD的选择标准。蓝色阴影区域显示LBD的选择标准。灰色符号可能是经典的红化AGN。蓝色圆圈代表单个LBD，红色方块代表单个X射线未探测到的LRD，而叉号代表X射线探测到的源。未通过致密性标准（在第2节中定义）的源用黑色圆圈突出显示，白色符号是暂定的宽线AGN（如第4.1节末尾所述）。红色星号显示从LRD的平均棱镜堆叠中测得的斜率，蓝色菱形显示LBD的堆叠（图2）。标有‘R’的两个大符号表示蓝色和红色罗塞塔石碑的位置（Juodžbalis等人，2024a；Brazzini等人，2026）。灰色等高线代表来自JADES、红移\(z>2\)的非AGN星系（Hainline等人，2025）。橙色五边形代表来自Vanden Berk等人（2001）的SDSS类星体复合光谱，并包含Glikman等人（2006）的近红外延伸。存在第三个‘红化AGN’（或处于宁静星系中的AGN），其\(\beta_{UV}=6\)，因此未出现在此图中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Prism stacks of the LRDs and LBDs in our sample. Both are mean stacks which have been normalised by the flux between 5200 and 5700 Å. The top panel shows the number of sources contributing to the stack at each wavelength. The yellow spectrum shows the composite spectrum of SDSS quasars from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) with the NIR extension from Glikman et al. ( 2006 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们样本中LRD和LBD的棱镜堆叠光谱。两者均为平均堆叠，并通过5200至5700 Å之间的流量进行了归一化。顶部面板显示了在每个波长处对堆叠有贡献的源数量。黄色光谱显示了来自Vanden Berk等人（2001）的SDSS类星体复合光谱，并包含Glikman等人（2006）的近红外延伸。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Bolometric to X-ray (2-10 keV rest frame) luminosity ratio as a function of bolometric luminosity for our sample of LRD and LBD. We also plot the same values for a sample of local optical/UV-selected quasars (Lusso et al. , 2020 ) , the best fit correlation for a similar sample, with 1- \(\sigma\) dispersion (Duras et al. , 2020 ) , and a sample of local Narrow-Line Seyfert 1s from Vasudevan and Fabian 2007 . The green circles are local super-Eddington accreting massive black holes (SEAMBHs) studied in Tortosa et al. ( 2026 ) . Symbols and colours refer to different properties as shown in the figure legend. We also include the ‘Saguaro’ which is an LRD studied in Rinaldi et al. ( 2025b ) with a faint X-ray detection (shown as the red circle in this figure). Note that the large star and diamond are the values for the stacks derived using the first method described in Section 7 , while the smaller star and diamond are the values derived for the stacks using the second method. The two large symbols marked with an ‘R’ indicate the location of the blue and red Rosetta Stones. The red crosses are the X-ray detected LRDs (where the one with a square is from Hviding et al. 2026 ), while the blue cross is a broad line AGN matching the color requirements for LBD, but which is X-ray detected.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于我们样本中的LRD和LBD，热光度与X射线（2-10 keV静止系）光度之比作为热光度的函数。我们还绘制了本地光学/紫外选择的类星体样本（Lusso等人，2020）的相同值、类似样本的最佳拟合相关性及其1-\(\sigma\)弥散（Duras等人，2020），以及来自Vasudevan和Fabian 2007的本地窄线Seyfert 1星系样本。绿色圆圈是Tortosa等人（2026）研究的本地超爱丁顿吸积大质量黑洞（SEAMBHs）。符号和颜色代表图中图例所示的不同属性。我们还包含了‘Saguaro’，这是Rinaldi等人（2025b）研究的一个具有微弱X射线探测的LRD（在此图中显示为红色圆圈）。请注意，大的星号和菱形是使用第7节中描述的第一种方法推导出的堆叠值，而较小的星号和菱形是使用第二种方法推导出的堆叠值。标有‘R’的两个大符号表示蓝色和红色罗塞塔石碑的位置。红色叉号是X射线探测到的LRD（其中带方形的来自Hviding等人2026），而蓝色叉号是一个满足LBD颜色要求但被X射线探测到的宽线AGN。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Rest-frame stacked Chandra thumbnails of the LRD (top) and LBD (bottom) samples, combining the CDF-S and CDF-N fields, in the three rest-frame bands used for the stacking analysis: 1–5 keV (left), 5–7.25 keV (centre), and 10–30 keV (right). Green circles mark the \(R=2^{\prime\prime}\) source extraction aperture and the \(5^{\prime\prime}\) – \(10^{\prime\prime}\) background annulus. Colour bars give the counts scale of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：LRD（顶部）和LBD（底部）样本的静止系堆叠钱德拉缩略图，结合了CDF-S和CDF-N天区，显示在用于堆叠分析的三个静止系波段：1–5 keV（左）、5–7.25 keV（中）和10–30 keV（右）。绿色圆圈标记了\(R=2^{\prime\prime}\)的源提取孔径和\(5^{\prime\prime}\) – \(10^{\prime\prime}\)的背景环。颜色条给出了每个面板的计数标度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Chandra spectrum of the X-ray detected LRD, with the main spectral properties resulting from the fit. Column densities ( \(N_{H}\) ) are calculated assuming Solar abundances.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：X射线探测到的LRD的钱德拉光谱，显示了拟合得出的主要光谱特性。柱密度（\(N_{H}\)）是在假设太阳丰度的情况下计算的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 10 : [O iii ]λ5007 EW as a function of Balmer break strength for the sources in our sample.The colours and markers are as in Fig. 1 . There is a weak anticorrelation between [O iii ]λ5007 EW and Balmer break strength, which may simply be induced by the fact that the optical continuum is used on both axes. LBDs seem to be broadly overlapping with LRDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图10：我们样本中源的[O iii]λ5007等值宽度作为巴尔默跳变强度的函数。颜色和标记与图1相同。[O iii]λ5007等值宽度与巴尔默跳变强度之间存在微弱的反相关，这可能仅仅是由于两个轴都使用了光学连续谱。LBDs似乎与LRDs大致重叠。

figures.caption_en: Figure 11 : [O iii ]λ5007 EW (Å) as a function of luminosity (erg/s) at \(\sim 5100\) Å (rest frame) for the individual sources in our sample. The colours and markers are as in Fig. 1 . The solid data points are those with [O iii ]λ5007 EW measured using the observed continuum, while the hollow darker red points are those measured using the UV continuum model extrapolated to 5007Å. The blue contours are JADES galaxies at 2<z<8 (excluding type 1 and 2 AGN) and the purple contours are SDSS quasars (Wu and Shen, 2022 ) . The LRDs and LBDs in our sample are consistent with both JADES galaxies and the low-luminosity part of the Baldwin relation of the SDSS quasars. However, the EW([OIII]) of both LBDs and LRDs (especially those inferred from the UV extrapolation – hollow squares) is generally higher than observed in normal star forming galaxies at the same luminosity.
figures.caption_zh: 图11：我们样本中单个源的[O iii]λ5007等值宽度（Å）作为\(\sim 5100\) Å（静止系）处光度（erg/s）的函数。颜色和标记与图1相同。实心数据点是使用观测到的连续谱测量[O iii]λ5007等值宽度的源，而空心的深红色点是使用外推到5007Å的紫外连续谱模型测量的源。蓝色等高线是JADES中红移2<z<8的星系（排除1型和2型AGN），紫色等高线是SDSS类星体（Wu and Shen, 2022）。我们样本中的LRD和LBD与JADES星系以及SDSS类星体Baldwin关系的低光度部分均一致。然而，LBD和LRD（尤其是那些从紫外外推推断出的——空心方块）的EW([OIII])通常高于相同光度下正常恒星形成星系中观测到的值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 12 : The distribution of broad Hα EWs for the LRDs and LBDs in our sample, compared to the distribution of SDSS quasars which are presented by the purple solid line. The red part of the bar represents the fraction of LRDs and the blue part represents the fraction of LBDs. The red line shows the EW of the red Rosetta stone, and the blur line represents the blue Rosetta stone. We find that LRDs and LBDs tend to have higher EWs than standard AGNs which has been found in other works (Maiolino et al. , 2025 ) . We also find that LRDs have higher EWs compared to LBDs which is discussed further in Fig. 13 .

title: LEGGOS III: Mapping Star Formation and Dust in Gravitationally Lensed Galaxies with $\textit{SUMAC}$, a UMAP and Clustering Framework
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure. In prep. for submission to RNAAS
summary: Strong gravitational lensing combined with JWST's spatio-spectral resolution enables resolved studies of star-forming regions in $z\sim$ 2-4 galaxies, but identifying and characterizing such regions in lensed integral-field and multi-band data remains a manual, observer-dependent process. We present $\texttt{SUMAC}$ (Software for the Uniform Manifold Approximation of Clumps), an unsupervised learning pipeline that segments JWST imaging and spectroscopy at the "spaxel" level by combining $\texttt{UMAP}$-based manifold embedding with $\texttt{HDBSCAN}$ density clustering applied to spectral energy distributions/spectra. We demonstrate the pipeline on JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFS observations of the lensed galaxy SGAS111020.0+645950.8 at $z = 2.481$, recovering six physically distinct stellar/nebular populations. The cluster median SEDs separate cleanly on the presence and strength of H$β$+[OIII], H$α$+[NII], $β_{NUV}$ slope, Balmer break strength, and the Balmer decrement, with bluer clusters tracing unobscured star-forming regions and progressively redder clusters tracing dusty star-forming regions.

AI.tldr: SUMAC是一个基于UMAP和HDBSCAN的无监督学习管道，能够在单像素级别自动分割JWST成像与光谱数据，识别透镜星系中的星族区域，并在SGAS111020.0+645950.8星系中成功恢复出六个物理上不同的恒星/星云群体。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜结合JWST的高分辨率数据虽能解析高红移星系中的恒星形成区，但当前对这些透镜数据的识别和表征仍依赖人工操作，缺乏自动化、客观的流程。
AI.method: 提出SUMAC管道，将UMAP流形嵌入与HDBSCAN密度聚类相结合，对JWST成像和光谱数据在单像素（spaxel）级别进行无监督聚类分割。
AI.result: 在透镜星系SGAS111020.0+645950.8（z=2.481）的JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFS数据上，成功恢复出六个物理上不同的星族，其聚类中值SED在Hβ+[OIII]、Hα+[NII]、NUV斜率、Balmer跃变强度和Balmer减缩等特征上清晰分离。
AI.conclusion: SUMAC能够自动、客观地识别透镜星系中不同物理性质的恒星形成区域，蓝色星团对应无遮蔽的恒星形成区，红色星团对应被尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区。

title: Finite-Core Signatures in LISA-Band Wave-Optics Lensing by Low-Mass Dark Matter Halos
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, comments are welcome
summary: LISA-band gravitational waves from massive binary black holes can be diffractively lensed by low-mass dark matter halos and subhalos, so their frequency-dependent amplification can probe the inner density profile. We isolate the generic finite-core part of this signal by comparing fixed-mass Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) and cored-NFW lenses and propagating both profiles to the complex wave-optics amplification factor. A finite core smooths the time-delay response and reshapes the diffraction peak; an NFW template with a lower concentration can mimic part of the effect, but structured complex residuals remain after time and phase alignment. The residual peaks for intermediate cores, $r_c/r_s\simeq0.25$--$0.3$. An SIDM-inspired isothermal-core profile gives the same qualitative response, showing that the signal is not an artifact of one cored parameterization. For a fiducial LISA source, an appreciable mismatch requires favorable near alignment and $M_{\rm vir}\gtrsim 10^7M_\odot$. The result is a finite-core baseline for isolated line-of-sight halos and for subhalos perturbing strongly lensed macro-images.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LISA频段引力波被暗物质晕衍射透镜效应，发现有限核结构会在波光学放大因子中留下独特特征，可用于探测暗物质晕的内部密度分布。
AI.motivation: 利用LISA频段引力波被低质量暗物质晕衍射透镜时的频率依赖性放大效应，来探测暗物质晕的内部密度廓线，特别是区分有核和无核结构。
AI.method: 通过比较固定质量的NFW和有核NFW透镜模型，将两种密度廓线传播到复波光学放大因子中，分析有限核结构对时间延迟响应和衍射峰的影响。
AI.result: 有限核结构会平滑时间延迟响应并重塑衍射峰；中间核尺度（rc/rs≈0.25-0.3）时残差峰值最大；SIDM等温核廓线给出相似结果；对于LISA源，需要有利的近对齐和Mvir≳10^7M⊙才能产生可观测的失配信号。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了有限核基线模型，可用于隔离视线方向暗物质晕和微扰强透镜宏像的子晕的衍射信号分析。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Convergence \(\kappa(u)\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos, where \(u=\xi/r_{s}\) . The three panels correspond to \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) . The black solid curve denotes the NFW profile, while the dashed, dash-dotted, and dotted curves correspond to cored-NFW profiles with \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) , respectively. A finite core suppresses the central convergence, with stronger suppression for larger \(r_{c}/r_{s}\) .

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Lensing potential \(\psi(u)\) for the same halo models as in Fig. 1 . The cored-NFW profiles produce a shallower inner potential than the NFW halo, and the difference increases with the core size. Since \(\psi\) enters the Fermat potential, these inner-potential differences are expected to propagate into both the time-domain and frequency-domain wave-optics observables.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 与图1相同晕模型的透镜势 \(\psi(u)\) 。带核NFW轮廓产生的内部势比NFW晕更浅，且差异随核尺寸增大而增加。由于 \(\psi\) 进入费马势，这些内部势差异预计会传播到时域和频域波光学可观测量的两者中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Time-domain diffraction integral \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos. The three columns correspond to \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) . The colors denote the impact parameters \(y=3,5,8\) , and the different line styles denote NFW and cored-NFW profiles with \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) . A finite core lowers and broadens the time-domain response, especially at small impact parameter.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: NFW和带核NFW晕的时域衍射积分 \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) 。三列分别对应 \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) 。颜色表示碰撞参数 \(y=3,5,8\) ，不同线型表示NFW和核半径 \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) 的带核NFW轮廓。有限核降低并展宽了时域响应，尤其在碰撞参数较小时。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Frequency-domain amplification factor \(|F(w)|\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos. The notation is the same as in Fig. 3 . The finite core changes both the first diffraction peak and the subsequent oscillatory structure. The effect is strongest for small impact parameter and becomes more pronounced for larger core size.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: NFW和带核NFW晕的频域放大因子 \(|F(w)|\) 。符号与图3相同。有限核改变了第一个衍射峰及随后的振荡结构。该效应在碰撞参数最小时最强，且随核尺寸增大而更加显著。

Right: frequency-domain amplification factor \(|F(w)|\) . The solid curves denote the NFW halo, while the dashed and dash-dotted curves denote IC-NFW profiles with \(s=0.1\) and \(s=1\) , respectively. The colors correspond to \(y=3,5,8\) . The color scale shows \(\log_{10}D_{full}\) , where \(D_{full}\) is the transfer-function residual norm defined in Appendix A . The cored-NFW truth has \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) , \(z_{L}=0.5\) , \(z_{S}=2.0\) , \(y_{true}=3\) , \(c_{true}=10\) , and \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1\) . The fiducial truth has \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) , \(z_{L}=0.5\) , \(z_{S}=2.0\) , \(y_{true}=3\) , and \(c_{true}=10\) . title: ALMA CO-CAVITY I. Resolved Molecular Gas in Void Galaxies
comment: 20 pages, 12 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The environment plays a key role in galaxy evolution, yet it remains unclear how detailed molecular gas properties and their connection to star formation and stellar content are influenced by both large-scale and local environments. Here we introduce the ALMA CO-CAVITY project, the first interferometric CO(1-0) survey of a large sample of 41 void galaxies (VGs) to characterise in detail their molecular gas properties. It is built over the CAVITY project, offering optical integral field unit (IFU) data, enabling a direct, pixel-to-pixel comparison between molecular gas (from ALMA), star formation, and stellar properties, as well as the derivation of their scaling relations. In this work we present ALMA data products for our sample, containing data cubes, moment maps and position-velocity diagrams at angular resolutions of 1 arcsec. We also present molecular gas, stellar mass, and star formation rate surface density maps at a common resolution of 2.5 arcsec. We contextualise our sample against representative unresolved and resolved surveys. While our sample provides a good representation of the VG population and follows the distribution of key properties seen in star-forming galaxy samples, galaxies included in resolved studies from the literature tend to be more massive, less isolated, and located in denser large-scale environments. We present global scaling relations for the ALMA CO-CAVITY sample and find that the molecular gas main sequence exhibits the smallest scatter (0.21 dex), followed by the Schmidt-Kennicutt relation and the star-forming main sequence. From integrated properties alone, we find that these scaling relations for VGs are compatible with those for denser environments. This paper lays the foundation for forthcoming studies exploiting this unique dataset.

title: The free-streaming length of dark matter from JWST observations of 28 strong gravitational lenses
comment: accepted by PRL
summary: The formation of gravitationally bound overdensities of dark matter (DM), or \textit{halos}, is a generic prediction of theories with particle DM. These bounds correspond to upper limits $λ_{\rm{FS}}<6.0 \ \rm{kpc}$ and $λ_{\rm{FS}}<7.0 \ \rm{kpc}$, and lower limits on the mass of a spin--1/2 thermal relic DM particle $m_{\rm{therm}}>7.4 \ \rm{keV}$ and $m_{\rm{therm}}>6.5 \ \rm{keV}$. Conversely, assuming a negligible free-streaming length, as predicted by CDM, we measure a projected mass in subhalos around elliptical galaxies $1.7_{-1.2}^{+2.6} \times 10^7 \ \mathrm{M}_{\odot} \ \rm{kpc^{-2}}$ at $95 \%$ confidence. title: Statistical imprints of wave-like dark matter on multiply-imaged galaxies in strong cluster lenses from JWST
comment: 19 pages
summary: Wave-like dark matter ($ψ$DM) is an elusive dark matter (DM) candidate. The model, often also called fuzzy or ultralight DM, proposes that DM is an extremely light ($m\sim10^{-22}$ eV) boson and thereby has a kpc-scale de Broglie wavelength. Hence, interference of DM gives rise to sub-galactic density fluctuations that can be studied with strong gravitational lensing. In this paper, we use the residual power spectrum, $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$, as a probe of $ψ$DM, which quantifies deviations from smooth lensing predictions, measured from multiply-imaged galaxies in strong cluster lenses. The key idea is that imprinted in these deviations are lensing distortions from DM substructure, which can be harnessed statistically to distinguish among DM theories. We simulate JWST-quality mock observations of strong gravitational lensing in galaxy clusters, modeling line-of-sight DM substructure within $ψ$DM and the standard cold dark matter (CDM) paradigms. Using mock deep observations ($\sim$ 20 hours), we find that $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$ is sensitive to both $ψ$DM particle mass and fluctuation amplitude, and can distinguish $ψ$DM fluctuations from CDM subhalos. We demonstrate that $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$ can be measured directly from data by modeling the smooth lensing with a local Curved Arc Basis formalism. With realistic modeling systematics, we find a statistically significant separation between $ψ$DM and CDM across $1 \lesssim k \lesssim 11\,\mathrm{kpc}^{-1}$ -- offering an independent probe of the wave-like nature of DM complementary to existing constraints.

title: NISER-IUCAA New Simulations of JWST GAlaxies and Quasars(NINJA): Properties of galaxies at $5 \leq z \leq 10$
comment: 27 pages, 16 figures, Submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present the NINJA suite of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations developed to investigate galaxy formation and evolution at $z \gtrsim 5$ in the era of JWST. Using our fiducial simulation, we explore a range of spectral synthesis prescriptions and dust attenuation models, demonstrating that suitably chosen parameters can reproduce the observed UV luminosity functions (UVLFs) over $5 \leq z \leq 10$. In all cases, the inferred dust-to-metal ratio evolves with redshift, although its normalization at fixed redshift varies by a factor of $\sim 7$, depending on the adopted dust--metallicity scaling and attenuation curve. These model variations introduce substantial scatter in predictions for the $B$-band luminosity function, the H$α$ luminosity function, the UV slope--UV magnitude relation, the stellar mass--Balmer ratio relation, and the relation between stellar and nebular colour excesses. Simultaneously reproducing these observables across multiple redshifts will therefore be essential for constraining dust models at high redshift with forthcoming observations. Observations of galaxies spanning a broad range of stellar masses with the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) will provide particularly strong and independent constraints on dust properties. Our fiducial models underpredict the UV luminosity function at $z \geq 10$ relative to current observations, even when adopting a top-heavy IMF and neglecting dust attenuation. We find that galaxy properties are not fully converged at these redshifts in our simulation, indicating that higher-resolution simulations are required to robustly model galaxies at $z > 10$. We further emphasize that degeneracies between feedback prescriptions used in our simulation and dust properties must be carefully addressed when interpreting high-redshift observations and calibrating galaxy formation models.

AI.motivation: 为了在JWST时代研究高红移（z≥5）星系的形成与演化，需要能够重现观测结果的宇宙学模拟工具，同时探究尘埃模型、反馈机制等关键物理过程对模拟结果的影响。
AI.method: 使用NINJA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，结合不同的光谱合成模型和尘埃衰减模型，调整参数以匹配5≤z≤10的观测UVLF，并比较多种观测量的预测结果。

title: The Lifecycle and Emission Properties of PAHs in Cosmological Hydrodynamic Galaxy Formation Simulations
comment: Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics; Comments Welcome
summary: We present the first cosmological model for the lifecycle and luminous properties of PAHs in galaxies as they evolve from z=6-->0. We model 40 zoom-in galaxies, coupled with an on-the-fly model for the evolution of dust grains in the ISM. We assume that PAHs are ultrasmall (a < 13 Angstrom) carbonaceous dust grains, and couple this model with single-photon excitation calculations to compute the emergent mid-infrared spectra. (1) If we assume that dust is large upon formation, then PAHs are naturally able to form in situ in the ISM via grain-grain shattering. Interstellar collision velocities increase in low density, diffuse gas in our model; as galaxies evolve, the increase in fractional mass of diffuse gas drives an increase in grain-grain collision velocities and a corresponding rise in the PAH mass fraction (qPAH) from ~5 x 10^{-4} at z~4 to ~10^{-2} at z~0. (2) Increased PAH production in the diffuse ISM results in an inverse relationship between qPAH and the molecular gas fraction. (3) The PAH light-to-mass ratio scales linearly with the radiation field intensity (LPAH/MPAH ~ G_0) but anti-correlates with qPAH, because high-Sigma_SFR galaxies have a denser ISM that suppresses shattering. This means the physical qPAH and observed LPAH/LFIR do not evolve in lockstep. (4) The PAH-metallicity relationship (PZR) arises naturally in this framework: galaxies enrich and grow their diffuse ISM fraction simultaneously, linking rising metallicity to rising qPAH. Our models represent the first to reproduce the PZR observed across z=0-2. (5) The LPAH-SFR and LPAH-M_mol relations emerge from two effects: more massive galaxies have larger PAH reservoirs, and higher-SFR galaxies excite their PAHs more efficiently per unit mass. Taken together, these results suggest that grain-grain shattering in the diffuse ISM is the main driver behind the evolution of cosmic PAH abundances.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个从z=6到z=0的星系演化中多环芳烃（PAHs）生命周期与光度的宇宙学模型，提出星际介质中尘埃-尘埃碎裂是PAHs形成的主要机制，成功再现了PAH质量分数演化、PAH-金属丰度关系等关键观测特征。
AI.motivation: 现有模型缺乏对PAHs在宇宙时间尺度上演化的系统描述，尚不清楚PAHs如何在星系中形成、增长及其发光特性随红移的演变规律。
AI.method: 基于40个zoom-in星系模拟，结合星际介质尘埃演化在线模型，将PAHs视为超小碳质尘埃（a<13Å），并耦合单光子激发计算以预测中红外光谱。
AI.result: (1)假设尘埃形成时为大颗粒，PAHs可通过颗粒间碎裂在原位形成；PAH质量分数从z~4的~5×10⁻⁴增至z~0的~10⁻²。(2)PAH增加与分子气体分数呈反比。(3)PAH光质比与辐射场强度线性正相关，但与qPAH反相关。(4)首次再现了z=0-2的PAH-金属丰度关系。(5)L_PAH与恒星形成率及分子质量的关系源于大质量星系具有更大PAH储库，高SFR星系对PAH激发更高效。
AI.conclusion: 星际介质中弥漫气体的尘埃-颗粒碎裂是驱动宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要机制。

We show the redshift evolution of the molecular gas fraction \(f_{mol}\) (blue; left axis) and \(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\) (red; right axis) for an example galaxy (galaxy 10407) from our simulation sample. The two quantities track nearly inversely such that when the \(f_{mol}\) is low, \(q_{PAH}\) is elevated owing to increased grain-grain interaction velocities in the diffuse ISM (which increases shattering rates, and therefore, the fraction of PAH grains).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：分子气体分数和\(q_{PAH}\)随宇宙时间反向演化。我们展示了模拟样本中一个示例星系（星系10407）的分子气体分数\(f_{mol}\)（蓝色；左轴）和\(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\)（红色；右轴）随红移的演化。这两个量几乎呈反向追踪关系，即当\(f_{mol}\)较低时，由于弥散ISM中颗粒-颗粒相互作用速度增加（这增加了碎裂速率，从而增加了PAH颗粒的比例），\(q_{PAH}\)升高。
